index_paragraph1: Projekt City is a unique and expansive Minecraft project that operates without funding and is entirely free to play for everyone. Our mission is to develop an easily navigable Minecraft world for everyone, while paying a lot of attention to details and flawless work. Within "Projekt City," we are constructing a large map that features a city, an airport, a hotel, and much more, with meticulous attention to detail and precision. We enhance the gameplay through intricate redstone creations and commands.
index_paragraph2: The Projekt City map spans 1,164 meters in width and 1,833 meters in length, covering a total area of 2,133,612 square meters, making it a very large Minecraft project! Our current efforts are focused on developing the airport and hotel, which occupy a significant portion of the map.
index_paragraph3: All versions after 4.1 are in English and will remain so until the project's completion, as adding other languages is a significant undertaking. We plan to introduce additional languages, such as German, French, and Italian, after completing the project to enhance accessibility for more players.
index_paragraph4: To provide detailed information, we have launched a website where players can find essential details and ask questions. We strive to address player requests swiftly and professionally, aiming to create a bug-free world. We encourage you to report any bugs or errors on our Discord server or forum. We are committed to enhancing our professionalism and skills in building, redstone, and commands to become more professional, more accurate and better!
index_img_basketball_alt: A modern yellow and white Minecraft basketball court with detailed lighting and a residential background.
index_img_basketball_caption: A professional basketball court providing sports and leisure activities for the city's residents.

index_img_garden_caption: A landscaped garden pond serving as a quiet relaxation area within the urban district.

index_img_hallway_caption: A modern office hallway designed for efficient navigation within the corporate buildings.

index_img_parking_caption: A multi-story parking facility built to manage high traffic volumes for city visitors.

index_img_airport_caption: The airport building, serving as a hub for international travel.
index_img_wheat_alt: A golden Minecraft wheat field with a red farm building in the distance on a sunny day.
index_img_wheat_caption: A sustainable wheat farm used for local food production in the suburban area.
index_img_farm_alt: Wide aerial shot of a large Minecraft farm with diverse crop fields and rolling green hills.
index_img_farm_caption: The main agricultural district, ensuring the city's supply through large-scale farming.

index_img_escalators_caption: Modern escalator systems facilitating quick access between different levels of the transit hub.
index_img_cherry_alt: A beautiful park area with custom pink cherry blossom trees and stone pathways.
index_img_cherry_caption: A cherry blossom park designed as a scenic public space for walks and nature lovers.
index_img_mall_alt: Large interior hall of a shopping mall with high ceilings, glass accents, and bright lighting.
index_img_mall_caption: A spacious shopping mall atrium serving as the central hub for trade and commerce.
index_img_train_alt: Exterior view of a large train station depot with a classic red roof and stone platform.
index_img_train_caption: A regional train station providing fast connections to the surrounding map areas.
index_img_hotel_alt: View of a large, multi-story modern building with structured facades and balconies.
index_img_hotel_caption: A modern hotel providing space for lodging and hospitality services for visitors.
index_img_entrance_alt: A luxurious entrance with a checkered green floor, grand staircase, and bright chandeliers.
index_img_entrance_caption: An elegant entrance to the hotel, designed to give all guests a memorable welcome.
index_img_pool_alt: A bright indoor swimming pool room with white walls, glass windows, and warm underwater lights.
index_img_pool_caption: A luxury indoor pool facility offering wellness and recreation for hotel guests.
index_img_cottage_alt: A charming wooden house pathway surrounded by green bushes and large oak trees.
index_img_cottage_caption: A scenic residential pathway leading through the quiet suburban living quarters.
index_img_pyramid_alt: A massive dark mountain pyramid standing as a landmark in a vast green landscape.
index_img_pyramid_caption: A grand mountain pyramid serving as a historical landmark and tourist attraction.
index_trailer_blocked_desc: This video is hosted by YouTube. Due to your privacy settings, you can not view it. You need to allow third-party content in your privacy settings to view it.
index_faq_q1: Am I allowed to use the world on a public server?
index_faq_a1_combined: Yes, you may use our world on servers, but you must draw attention to our project and inform us about it. Further information about how you are allowed to use our world can you find in our ${use_our_world_link}.
index_faq_q2: Does it cost money to play the world?
index_faq_a2: No, Projekt City is completely free to play. You still need to own Minecraft before playing to be able to play the world.
index_faq_q3: I have found an error, what do I do?
index_faq_a3_combined: First of all, thank you for finding this bug. You can find the form to report bugs under the following address: ${bug_report_link}. Open the link, fill out the form as precise as you can and we will take care of the bug. If we need further information, we will reach out to you.
index_faq_q4: On which platforms can you also find Projekt City?
index_faq_a4_combined: You can find Projekt City on Instagram, Threads, TikTok and YouTube. And more platforms will follow! You can find our social media channels at ${linktree_link}.
index_faq_q5: When will there be a new update for the map?
index_faq_a5_combined: Our biggest update V5.0 is out now and is waiting to be downloaded by you! V6.0 will follow shortly and contain even more improvements and innovations. You can download it here: ${curseforge_link}
